majorIds.Requiem: Sunflare regenerates twice the health and mana.

add.lore: When the lost city of Sarnfic sunk beneath the depths, nothing but the bubbles of screams and this single wand surfaced. When used, you can still hear the town's lament.

majorIds.Phantom Slip: Activating Life Steal or Mana Steal will grant +60% speed bonus for 0.7 seconds.

add.lore: On the base of this ancient staff, a faded inscription surrounds a carving of an empty nest: las ah sifpas il lelis, pactef nikcpadpets tofcef. luh prifad il kahnukc krad, nikckrahad il pahudef. kisal luh udpets tofcef, luh tofnikclotsecisah. tof il trasped lokc  cof, priftastah uc tofsascah. 8  5al sifkel

This ornate bow holds a sinister beauty. Each rediscovery marks impending disaster, against any force that attempts to overcome it. Such is the inevitability of fate: irreverent to the will of masses, an epoch starts anew.

Despite the existence of the Nether Portal, few believe that it is possible to open such rifts with sheer force alone. None believe that a tool with enough power to accomplish such a monumental feat could exist. And yet...
The parting gift of a condemned lover: a mesh of starstuff, bound with hope. A reminder that the heavens will always guide you home. A forgiveness. This parcel never reached its destination.

majorIds.Blazing Effigy: Regeneration increases Totem's damage by +14% +6% instead of restoring health.

add.lore: The act of self-immolation is never taken lightly, and is always a sacrifice. This idol was carved to honor one such instance, in which a master of flame burned through his life force in a final act of heroism-purging an encroaching army of the undead, saving the people of the jungle from destruction.

majorIds.Tidal Drift: Flying Kick will instead send you forwards. This effect is limited to once per Charge cast.

add.lore: Intricate carvings and images, almost like that of a totem pole, cover the shaft of this marvelous trident, dredged up from the Seavale Reef. Foreign magics heighten the senses of its user in battle, but also instills a longing for the ocean. Many have succumbed to this urge and drowned themselves.

majorIds.Gruesome Knots: Bleeding and Twisted Tether deal double damage, but Bleeding duration is reduced.

before.lore: A dusty old tome, containing all the powers of the abyss. From its pages spring forth the blackest of secrets and the darkest of truths. Do not let yourself slip into its grasp, for it will consume you too.

majorIds.Gruesome Knots: Bleeding and Twisted Tether deal double the damage, but Bleeding duration is reduced.

after.lore: A dusty old tome, containing all the powers of the abyss. From its pages spring forth the blackest of secrets and the darkest of truths. Do not let yourself slip into its grasp, for it will consume you too.

majorIds.Meteor Crash: Burning Sigil gains +6 radius and deals double the damage, but lasts half as long.
Burning Sigil gains +6 radius and deals 4x the damage, but lasts half as long.

majorIds.Old Spark: Whirlwind transforms into a travelling projectile, exploding on contact and knocking enemies into the air. Hold shift to rise with them.

before.lore: recnal il il. alac toc, pasad il, atlruc il, kaclahpokc il cefos. lahes il nikcrolad kec pahsofmal uc ifrah tofnikcsif. etlefrofmad uc, etlaces uc tofnikcsoftahal. rofmel lahrakctriltod uc tofpahnuc. lahic cof efrofmad il pahsadiled uc tofifrah. etlalnes ah rofmedes uc tofpestal. pasad uc tofmahatskritsec. etlrakc kec. etlrakc kec.

majorIds.Last Resort: Bloodlust has doubled corrupted scaling and knockback, but deals -200% -120%.
Bloodlust has doubled corrupted scaling and knockback, but deals -100% -60%.

majorIds.Gentle Glow: Orphion's Pulse restores 5% more max health per pulse, but heals at a slower rate.
Orphion's Pulse restores 10% more max health per pulse, but heals at a slower rate.

majorIds.Space Glide: Lacerate performs a single horizontal jump and slash, dealing 400%.

before.lore: Carelessly aloft, between the heavens and the abyss...

majorIds.Space Glide: Lacerate performs a single horizontal jump and slash, dealing 500%.

after.lore: Carelessly aloft, between the heavens and the abyss...

majorIds.Gruesome Knots: Bleeding and Twisted Tether deal double damage, but Bleeding duration is reduced.

before.lore: Decay spreads unseen, but you know it spreads, and that is enough.

majorIds.Gruesome Knots: Bleeding and Twisted Tether deal double the damage, but Bleeding duration is reduced.

after.lore: Decay spreads unseen, but you know it spreads, and that is enough.

majorIds.Gentle Glow: Orphion's Pulse restores 5% more max health per pulse, but heals at a slower rate.

before.lore: Under the waters, between the waves, there lies something-something beautiful.

majorIds.Gentle Glow: Orphion's Pulse restores 10% more max health per pulse, but heals at a slower rate.

after.lore: Under the waters, between the waves, there lies something-something beautiful.

majorIds.Gentle Glow: Orphion's Pulse restores 5% more max health per pulse, but heals at a slower rate.
Orphion's Pulse restores 10% more max health per pulse, but heals at a slower rate.

majorIds.Regicide: Your deal 2% more damage for every block you are away from your target (Max 120%).

before.lore: A boiling rage has been gathering, the pain of an entire empire yearning to be freed. With all the power of the downtrodden and the overlooked and the starved, you echo out a shout with ten thousand voices, each too quiet to hear by itself, but together a catastrophic force to make the heavens cower.

majorIds.Regicide: You deal 2% more damage for every block you are away from your target (Max 120%).

after.lore: A boiling rage has been gathering, the pain of an entire empire yearning to be freed. With all the power of the downtrodden and the overlooked and the starved, you echo out a shout with ten thousand voices, each too quiet to hear by itself, but together a catastrophic force to make the heavens cower.

majorIds.Solar Wind: Thunderstorm disables Meteor and grants +3 thunderbolts, +3 radius and deal 100% and 110% each. Unstable now activates on Thunderstorm for 400% bonus damage.

before.lore: From afar, a faint light glimmers. A brighter light next. Another. Then another still. A cascade of blinding force, more than anything you could have ever imagined. And then... nothing. As though there was never anything there.

majorIds.Solar Wind: Thunderstorm disables Meteor, grants +3 thunderbolts, +3 radius and deals 100% and 110% each. Unstable now activates on Thunderstorm for 400% bonus damage.

after.lore: From afar, a faint light glimmers. A brighter light next. Another. Then another still. A cascade of blinding force, more than anything you could have ever imagined. And then... nothing. As though there was never anything there.

majorIds.Divine Right: Your Maximum Health is reduced by 60%. For every 100 HP lost, Sacred Surge's damage is increased by 5%.

before.lore: There is very little outside the purview of those with power. No matter the circumstance, those in a higher position can, will, and have justified their actions in different ways. Some reasons are fine, some are weak. But what sort of justification is there, for those in the highest position? You have the floor.

majorIds.Divine Right: Your Maximum Health is reduced by 75%. For every 100 HP lost, Sacred Surge's damage is increased by 3%.

after.lore: There is very little outside the purview of those with power. No matter the circumstance, those in a higher position can, will, and have justified their actions in different ways. Some reasons are fine, some are weak. But what sort of justification is there, for those in the highest position? You have the floor.

majorIds.Meteor Crash: Burning Sigil gains +6 radius and deals double the damage, but lasts half as long.
Burning Sigil gains +6 radius and deals 4x the damage, but lasts half as long.

majorIds.Heroine's Blessing: Devout Union gains +25% damage redirection and +8 radius. Additionally, Enlightenment now only requires 1 broken mantle per mantle given to allies.

before.lore: A vow of protection hangs over this spear, now inhabited by the spirit of a legendary heroine. Even simply a glimpse of the burning blade will instill a feeling of protection and security, and that feeling will hold true if one is brave enough to wield it.

majorIds.Heroine's Blessing: Devout Union gains +25% damage redirection and +8 radius. Additionally, Mantles given by Enlightenment have +20% damage reduction.

after.lore: A vow of protection hangs over this spear, now inhabited by the spirit of a legendary heroine. Even simply a glimpse of the burning blade will instill a feeling of protection and security, and that feeling will hold true if one is brave enough to wield it.

before.lore: Your flesh is but a weak imitation of power, a flabby welter of gushing blood and brittle bones, stitched together with threads of weak hope. There is only one way through: you must supplement your failing heart.

after.lore: Your flesh is but a weak imitation of power, a flabby welter of gushing blood and brittle bones, stitched together with threads of weak hope. There is only one way through: you must supplant your failing heart.

majorIds.Last Resort: Bloodlust has doubled corrupted scaling and knockback, but deals -200% -120%.

before.lore: Soldiers training in extreme cold conditions often push themselves beyond the limits. This however is not sustainable, as their bodies frantically scramble for survival.

majorIds.Last Resort: Bloodlust has doubled corrupted scaling and knockback, but deals -100% -60%.

after.lore: Soldiers training in extreme cold conditions often push themselves beyond the limits. This however is not sustainable, as their bodies frantically scramble for survival.

majorIds.Gruesome Knots: Bleeding and Twisted Tether deal double damage, but Bleeding duration is reduced.

before.lore: Every ounce of your suffering must be made worth it. Otherwise, what was the point of it all?
